description: Translate all remaining hardcoded English log messages in gameLogic.ts and gameStore.ts to Spanish. The game log currently shows many messages in English when the game is played in Spanish. Since the log system does NOT use the i18n keys (messages are built inline as strings), the fix is to replace the English text with Spanish directly in the source code. Some messages are already in Spanish (e.g. 'Cosecha: todos los jugadores reciben +1 moneda', 'mueve', etc.), but many remain in English.
steps:
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, translate ALL English log messages to Spanish. Here is the comprehensive list of English messages that need translation (line numbers approximate). Replace them with their Spanish equivalents:

- 'Game started! Season: Spring' -> 'Juego iniciado! Estacion: Primavera'
- `Season Setup: ${season}` -> `Preparacion de Estacion: ${season}` (and capitalize the season name in Spanish: spring->Primavera, summer->Verano, autumn->Otono)
- `War province tokens placed on ${n} provinces` -> `Fichas de guerra colocadas en ${n} provincias`
- 'Tea Ceremony Phase begins' -> 'Comienza la Fase de Ceremonia del Te'
- `${player.name} returns ${count} hostage(s) to ${targetName}, gains ${count} coin(s)` -> `${player.name} devuelve ${count} rehen(es) a ${targetName}, gana ${count} moneda(s)`
- 'All alliances broken for Tea Ceremony' -> 'Todas las alianzas rotas para la Ceremonia del Te'
- 'Mandate deck reshuffled' -> 'Mazo de mandatos barajado'
- `${player.name} issues ${mandate.toUpperCase()} mandate` -> `${player.name} emite mandato ${mandate.toUpperCase()}`
- `Recruit mandate issued by ${name} - all players may summon figures...` -> `Mandato de Reclutar emitido por ${name} - todos los jugadores pueden invocar figuras en sus fortalezas en orden de resolucion. Emisor y aliado obtienen +1 colocacion extra.`
- `${player.name} summons a ${figureType} in ${province.name}` -> `${player.name} invoca un ${figureType} en ${province.name}` (keep figureType in Spanish: bushi/shinto stay the same)
- 'Recruit mandate resolved' -> 'Mandato de Reclutar resuelto'
- `${name} has no placements available - skipped` -> `${name} no tiene colocaciones disponibles - saltado`
- `Marshal mandate issued by ${name}...` -> `Mandato de Movilizar emitido por ${name} - todos los jugadores pueden mover figuras en orden de resolucion. Emisor y aliado pueden construir una fortaleza (3 monedas).`
- 'Train mandate issued...' -> 'Mandato de Entrenar emitido - todos los jugadores pueden comprar 1 carta de estacion del mercado en orden de resolucion. Emisor y aliado obtienen descuento de -1.'
- `${player.name} buys ${card.name} for ${cost} coins` -> `${player.name} compra ${card.name} por ${cost} monedas`
- `(discounted)` -> `(con descuento)`
- `${player.name} buys ${card.name} for ${cost} coins (Ryujin)` -> `${player.name} compra ${card.name} por ${cost} monedas (Ryujin)`
- `${from.name} and ${to.name} form an alliance!` -> `${from.name} y ${to.name} forman una alianza!`
- `${issuer.name} breaks their alliance and loses honor` -> `${issuer.name} rompe su alianza y pierde honor`
- `${issuer.name} replaces ${owner.name}'s ${figure.type} in ${province.name}` -> `${issuer.name} reemplaza ${figure.type} de ${owner.name} en ${province.name}`
- 'Betray mandate resolved' -> 'Mandato de Traicionar resuelto'
- `${player.name} moves to top of Honor Track (Amaterasu)` -> `${player.name} sube a la cima del Track de Honor (Amaterasu)`
- `${player.name} gains 2 Ronin tokens (Hachiman)` -> `${player.name} obtiene 2 fichas de Ronin (Hachiman)`
- `${player.name} gains ${n} VP from Fortresses (Susanoo)` -> `${player.name} obtiene ${n} PV por Fortalezas (Susanoo)`
- `${player.name} gains 2 Coins (Tsukuyomi)` -> `${player.name} obtiene 2 Monedas (Tsukuyomi)`
- '--- Kami Turn ---' -> '--- Turno Kami ---'
- `Shrine ${n} (${name}) - no figures, skipped` -> `Santuario ${n} (${name}) - sin figuras, saltado`
- `Shrine ${n}: ${winner.name} wins ${kamiName} (force: ${f})` -> `Santuario ${n}: ${winner.name} gana ${kamiName} (fuerza: ${f})`
- `${name} may perform up to 2 Movements (Fujin)` -> `${name} puede realizar hasta 2 Movimientos (Fujin)`
- `${name} may Summon 1 Bushi to any Province (Raijin)` -> `${name} puede Invocar 1 Bushi en cualquier Provincia (Raijin)`
- `${name} has no Bushi in reserve (Raijin - no effect)` -> `${name} no tiene Bushi en reserva (Raijin - sin efecto)`
- `${name} may acquire a Season Card (Ryujin)` -> `${name} puede adquirir una Carta de Estacion (Ryujin)`
- '--- End Kami Turn ---' -> '--- Fin Turno Kami ---'
- War upgrade logs: `gains 3 Coins (Way of the Shogun)` -> `obtiene 3 Monedas (Way of the Shogun)`, etc. Pattern: replace 'gains' with 'obtiene', 'Coins' with 'Monedas', 'VP' stays 'PV', 'Ronin' stays, 'takes coins from less honorable players' -> 'toma monedas de jugadores con menor honor', 'may perform Naginata movement' -> 'puede realizar movimiento Naginata', 'may place Ashigaru' -> 'puede colocar Ashigaru', 'Bushi have Force 2 during War' -> 'los Bushi tienen Fuerza 2 durante la Guerra', 'may kill up to 2 enemy figures' -> 'puede eliminar hasta 2 figuras enemigas'
- '=== War Phase begins ===' -> '=== Comienza la Fase de Guerra ==='
- `${province.name}: empty - war token discarded` -> `${province.name}: vacia - ficha de guerra descartada`
- `${winner.name} wins war token in ${province.name} (uncontested)` -> `${winner.name} gana ficha de guerra en ${province.name} (sin oposicion)`
- `${winner.name} wins war token in ${province.name} (allied - no battle)` -> `${winner.name} gana ficha de guerra en ${province.name} (aliados - sin batalla)`
- `${n} battles to resolve` -> `${n} batallas por resolver`
- `(${contested} contested, ${uncontested} uncontested)` -> `(${contested} disputadas, ${uncontested} sin oposicion)`
- `${bidder.name} commits Seppuku: kills ${n} figures for ${n} VP and ${n} Honor now ${vp} PV and position ${pos} at Honor` -> `${bidder.name} comete Seppuku: elimina ${n} figuras por ${n} PV y ${n} Honor ahora ${vp} PV y posicion ${pos} en Honor`
- `${bidder.name} takes a hostage from ${victim.name}` -> `${bidder.name} toma un rehen de ${victim.name}`
- `${bidder.name} hires ronin: +${force} force` -> `${bidder.name} contrata ronin: +${force} fuerza`
- `${name} gains ${n} VP from Imperial Poets` -> `${name} obtiene ${n} PV de Poetas Imperiales`
- `${winner.name} wins the battle in ${province.name}!` -> `${winner.name} gana la batalla en ${province.name}!`
- 'Cleanup: Ronin and coins discarded, Shinto returned from temples' -> 'Limpieza: Ronin y monedas descartados, Shinto devueltos de los santuarios'
- 'Winter - Final Scoring' -> 'Invierno - Puntuacion Final'
- `${player.name} scores ${vp} VP from ${card.name}` -> `${player.name} anota ${vp} PV de ${card.name}`
- `${player.name} scores ${n} VP from war province tokens` -> `${player.name} anota ${n} PV de fichas de provincia de guerra`
- `${player.name} scores ${n} VP from province token set (${count} unique)` -> `${player.name} anota ${n} PV por set de fichas de provincia (${count} unicas)`
- `${winner.name} and ${ally.name} share victory with ${vp} VP!` -> `${winner.name} y ${ally.name} comparten la victoria con ${vp} PV!`
- `${winner.name} wins with ${vp} VP!` -> `${winner.name} gana con ${vp} PV!`
- `Politics Phase begins - ${name} takes the first mandate turn` -> `Comienza la Fase de Politica - ${name} toma el primer turno de mandato`
- 'No battles to resolve - moving to Cleanup' -> 'No hay batallas por resolver - pasando a Limpieza'
- 'Cleanup Phase begins' -> 'Comienza la Fase de Limpieza'
- 'Kami Turn - no temples with figures, skipping' -> 'Turno Kami - ningun santuario con figuras, saltando'
- `${name} skips card purchase` -> `${name} no compra carta`
- `${name} ends their marshal turn` -> `${name} termina su turno de movilizar`
- `${player.name} builds a fortress in ${province.name} (${cost} coins)` -> `${player.name} construye una fortaleza en ${province.name} (${cost} monedas)`

In src/store/gameStore.ts, translate ALL English log messages to Spanish:

- `${player.name} summons a ${recruitFigureType} at ${jinmenjuProvince.name} using Jinmenju (loses honor)` -> `${player.name} invoca un ${recruitFigureType} en ${jinmenjuProvince.name} usando Jinmenju (pierde honor)`
- `${player.name} places a shinto at ${capitalize(temple.kamiType)} shrine using Jinmenju (loses honor)` -> `${player.name} coloca un shinto en santuario de ${capitalize(temple.kamiType)} usando Jinmenju (pierde honor)`
- `Luna: no valid province for monster placement - ${boughtCard.name} stays in reserve` -> `Luna: no hay provincia valida para colocar monstruo - ${boughtCard.name} se queda en reserva`
- `${player.name} places a shinto at ${capitalize(temple.kamiType)} shrine` -> `${player.name} coloca un shinto en santuario de ${capitalize(temple.kamiType)}`
- `Luna: no valid province for monster placement - monster stays in reserve` -> `Luna: no hay provincia valida para colocar monstruo - el monstruo se queda en reserva`
- `${monsterPlacementCard.name} placed in ${province.name}` -> `${monsterPlacementCard.name} colocado en ${province.name}`
- `${monsterPlacementCard.name} sent to worship at a temple` -> `${monsterPlacementCard.name} enviado a rezar a un santuario`
- `Komainu placed as shinto at ${capitalize(temple.kamiType)} temple` -> `Komainu colocado como shinto en santuario de ${capitalize(temple.kamiType)}`
- `${player.name} summons a Bushi to ${province.name} (Raijin)` -> `${player.name} invoca un Bushi en ${province.name} (Raijin)`
- 'Ryujin reward skipped' -> 'Recompensa de Ryujin saltada'
acceptance_criteria: All log messages in gameLogic.ts are in Spanish
All log messages in gameStore.ts are in Spanish
npx vite build succeeds without errors
